software-engineer.title: Aqib - Software Engineer
software-engineer.summary: Experienced full-stack software engineer specializing in web development, cloud architecture, and scalable applications. Passionate about creating innovative solutions that drive business growth.
experience: Senior Software Engineer at TechCorp (2020 - Present): Architected and deployed microservices platform serving 1M+ users daily using Node.js, React, and AWS.
Full Stack Developer at Innovate Solutions (2018 - 2020): Developed responsive web applications with modern JavaScript frameworks and Python/Django backends.
Software Engineer at DigitalWorks (2016 - 2018): Built RESTful APIs, optimized database queries, and implemented CI/CD pipelines.
education: B.S. Computer Science, University of Technology (2012 - 2016)
